query:
SELECT 
  section,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as installment_paid,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN bad_debt ELSE 0 END) as device_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_row_total_amount,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_paid_sum_total_amount
FROM debt_collected_cache 
GROUP BY section
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT 
  section,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as installment_paid,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN bad_debt ELSE 0 END) as device_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_row_total_amount,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_paid_sum_total_amount
FROM debt_collected_cache 
GROUP BY section
